category_sources: Official FastNetMon documentation covers deployment and network traffic monitoring features.
source_facts.description says FastNetMon is a DDoS detection tool with sFlow, Netflow, IPFIX, and port mirror support.
display_name_sources: Official project documentation and GitHub repository use the FastNetMon name.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is an additional upstream documentation surface.
Official fastnetmon.com docs are the dedicated documentation site.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/pavel-odintsov/fastnetmon, so repo is intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names DDoS, sFlow, Netflow, IPFIX, and port mirroring support.
